metadata.homeTitle: YolyStudio | Aesthetics, Wellness & Notary in Miami
metadata.homeDescription: A sanctuary for high-end cosmetology and aesthetics with official notary services in Miami, Florida.
metadata.reservasDescription: Book your wellness experience or notary service at YolyStudio, Miami. Choose your service, date, and time in one place.

hero.quote: Premium facials, high-end rejuvenation, and personalized body treatments, combined with official notary services for your total convenience.

servicesSection.description: Cutting-edge treatment room design and personalized cosmetology, body contouring massages, and cellular rejuvenation. All performed with strict clinical standards.

experience.title: Who is Yoly?
bio: Yoly is a Venezuelan professional who has turned her passion for wellness and beauty into a life mission. A registered nurse with surgical area experience, she has combined her health expertise with advanced aesthetics training to deliver safe, personalized treatments with outstanding results.

A specialist in the United States in comprehensive face and body care, her approach goes beyond aesthetics: she seeks to improve the confidence, well-being, and quality of life of every person who trusts her hands.
Her commitment to excellence, continuous education, and human-centered care have made her a professional recognized for her dedication, ethics, and love for what she does.
For Yoly, every treatment is an opportunity to enhance her clients' natural beauty, always offering service grounded in knowledge, experience, and care.
experience.quote: True beauty emerges when care, health, and wellness come together in perfect harmony.
experience.portraitAlt: Yoly Aleman, cosmetologist and notary at YolyStudio

video.title: Experience
video.description: A sanctuary in Miami where every detail is designed for your well-being. Discover the atmosphere, warmth, and care that set us apart.

instagram.title: The Ritual of
instagram.description: Join our community where we share professional skincare tips, cosmetology insights, and daily wellness habits.
instagram.quote: A facial is not a luxury, it is a health discipline. Your skin reflects your inner well-being and the daily care you give it.
instagram.postBody: In this post we celebrate our Premium Rejuvenation ritual. The use of titanium micro-needles gently stimulates your skin's regenerative defenses, allowing hyaluronic acid to penetrate up to 90% deeper. The resulting texture and smoothness are unmatched.

reviews.title: Reviews on
reviews.description: Read what our clients say on Google and share your experience at Clinic YolyStudio. Your review helps more people find professional care and real results.

bookingCta.title: Book your experience
bookingCta.description: Choose your treatment, date, and time in a simple, straightforward process with no endless scrolling.

footer.description: A sanctuary for certified skin care and notary services in Doral, Florida. Designed to beautify your skin, relax your body, and handle your official legal documents in one place.

serviceModal.successMessage: Thank you {name}, we have received your appointment request for {service} on {date} at {time}. Yoly will contact you at {phone} to confirm your appointment.

reservas.headline: Book Your Wellness Experience Online
reservas.ticketMessage: Your spot is secured! Yoly will contact you personally if any details are needed beforehand. Please arrive 30 minutes before your scheduled time.
reservas.step1of3: Step 1 of 3 · Select an option to continue
reservas.step2of3: Step 2 of 3 · Choose when you want your session
reservas.selectDayPrompt: Select a day on the calendar to see available time slots.
reservas.step3of3: Step 3 of 3 · Review your information before booking
reservas.notesPlaceholder: Skin conditions, allergies, or details for notary service
reservas.freeCancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours in advance.
reservas.depositNote: A $50 deposit confirms your appointment; the balance is paid at the studio.
reservas.closedSunday: YolyStudio is closed on Sundays for rest. Please select another day on the calendar.

errors.processFailed: We could not process your booking. Please try again.

confirmacion.paymentNotVerified: We could not verify your payment
confirmacion.paymentNotVerifiedBody: The payment reference is missing or the system is unavailable. If you were charged, contact us and we will resolve it immediately.
confirmacion.referenceNotFoundBody: We could not find this payment session. Check the link or try booking again.
confirmacion.paymentPendingBody: Your payment has not been completed yet. You can try again from the booking center.
confirmacion.thankYou: Thank you {name}. Your payment was received and your spot is reserved.
confirmacion.followUp: Yoly will confirm your appointment personally. You will receive your Stripe receipt by email.
